name: Toast POS - Loyalty Lookup - Incentivio
snippet:
Toast's Loyalty Lookup feature allows for you to search for your customers' loyalty information right on your POS.
By searching their name, email address, or phone number, you will be able to see their point totals, active offers, and more.
